name: Liverpool Athletics Track (Wavertree Athletics Centre)
metaTitle: Wavertree Athletics Centre Liverpool | Info & Wind Speed
metaDescription: Check live wind speed and facility information for the Wavertree Athletics Centre in Liverpool.

trackInfo.heading: Opening Times
trackInfo.text: Opening hours vary; the facility is a major regional hub for clubs and schools. Check the Lifestyles website for session availability.

trackInfo.heading: Entry Price
trackInfo.text: Access is available via Lifestyles memberships or pay-as-you-go sessions. Contact the centre for current visitor rates.

trackInfo.heading: Track Details
trackInfo.text: A world-class Hub venue featuring an 8-lane track and a state-of-the-art indoor athletics training facility.

trackInfo.heading: Parking Details
trackInfo.text: Free on-site parking at Wavertree Sports Park. Access to the Athletics Centre is via the Liverpool Tennis Centre.

trackInfo.heading: Address
trackInfo.text: Wavertree Sports Park, Wellington Road, Liverpool, L15 4LE

trackInfo.heading: Website
trackInfo.text: Check facility updates and timetables via the Liverpool City Council Lifestyles website.
